title: Black Tusk Siege of Washington
summary: The endgame invasion in which Black Tusk enters Washington, places the city under siege and reveals its campaign against SHD.

claims.text: Black Tusk enters Washington after Agents restore the network, rescue President Ellis and retake Capitol Hill from the True Sons.
The private military group places Washington under siege.
After confronting Black Tusk at Tidal Basin, Division Agents recover the antivirals taken during the campaign.

paragraphs.text: The siege begins when the opening campaign appears close to victory. Black Tusk's arrival reveals that the network failure and struggle over the antiviral belong to a broader national campaign.

timeline.label: After Capitol Hill is retaken — Black Tusk invades Washington

verification.notes: This event page covers the official 2020 recap and does not yet enumerate every invaded mission.
